introduction.heading: Set up a passkey
paragraphs: You'll be asked to scan your face or fingerprint, or enter your device passcode, PIN or pattern.
introduction.guidanceNoticeTitle: Where will my passkey be saved?
introduction.guidanceNoticeContent1: Your passkey will be saved privately to you device or cloud account - such as your password manager.
introduction.guidanceNoticeContent2: Your biometric data won't be shared with GOV.UK One Login or any services that you access with it.
